title: Can't connect to API using Postman - No query string was present
excerpt:
Hi I am having trouble with connecting API with Postman 
I am authenticating correctly as far as I can tell. 
I tried: 
RAW 
{ 
“query” : “query {board(limit:1) {id}}” 
} 
can anyone assist?
